text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm visiting a racecourse today to<n>inspect it for
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I've heard the good news, Oguri!<n>Looks like
they're having an event to<n>mark the release of
your plushie!<n>Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Your family must be so proud of their<n>little star!
I'd love to get the scoop on<n>their heartwarming
reaction. When are<n>they available for an
interview?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, my parents are back in my<n>hometown, so—

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't mind talking over the<n>phone! Sooo, if
you would just tell me<n>your family's phone
number...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-their number? Um, it's zero—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Interview or not, asking for personal<n>information
is unacceptable. As a<n>member of the academy, I
can't stand<n>idly by.
choice_data_list:
Please contact the academy if you have any
further questions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Huh, and who might you be? Th-that<n>badge...
Haha, you must be from the<n>academy, eh? Well,
I'll be on my way,<n>then!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for saving me. I had a feeling<n>that
reporter didn't have good<n>intentions.
choice_data_list:
You should turn reporters down the second you
think it's suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But that reporter called me a star.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And he told me that stars have an<n>obligation to
respond because that's<n>what their fans would
want.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I thought if I refused to answer...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'd be letting everyone down.<n>Is that not
true?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's clear she regards her fans<n>highly... but that
makes what I'm<n>about to say all the more
important.
choice_data_list: You need to be firm in turning them down.
You need to be firm in turning them down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: Your true fans care about you as well.
Your true fans care about you as well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Tome and Shige used to<n>always tell
me I was their treasure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means I should protect<n>myself... so I
can protect their treasure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I see where you're coming<n>from. I'll make
sure to refuse next<n>time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder if I'll really be able to do it<n>properly,
though.
choice_data_list: If you can't do it yourself, ask an adult for help.
I'll teach you a special phrase.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'll do that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll be counting on you when the<n>time
comes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The way you handled the<n>conversation
earlier was very<n>impressive. Plus, you just
happen to<n>be from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... Could I ask for your help again?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback by her frank<n>request.
Everything she said is true,<n>but...
choice_data_list: You're really straightforward... almost to a fault.
You're really straightforward... almost to a fault.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I've heard. My mom often<n>praised me for
it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later on, I see Oguri Cap candidly<n>asking other
adults in the academy<n>various questions.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...A special phrase?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's... exactly what you told the<n>reporter!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And the reporter ran off the second<n>they heard
those words. Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as she finishes speaking, a<n>woman runs
over to us.

text_block_list.name: Equipe
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are, Oguri! About the<n>plushie—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Please contact the academy regarding<n>that
question!

text_block_list.name: Equipe
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Wait, what?! Weren't we<n>scheduled to have
a meeting about<n>manufacturing your plushie
today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh. Yes, that's right... S-sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seems like it'll take a little more work<n>before she
can use her special phrase<n>properly.
